description_long: An elderly man with a long, flowing white beard and mustache stands upright, exuding a sense of wisdom and calm. He wears a traditional, loose-fitting robe in shades of white and gray, with wide sleeves and a dark belt at the waist. His hair is long, white, and tied up in a neat topknot, complementing his distinguished facial hair. The robe extends to his ankles, revealing dark pants and simple, flat shoes. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his facial features are marked by a serene expression and pronounced eyebrows. The overall appearance suggests a dignified elder, possibly a sage or master, dressed in formal, traditional attire.
description: An elderly man with a long white beard, topknot hairstyle, and traditional white and gray robe, standing upright with a calm expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full beard, topknot, facial features, and the detailed front of the robe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the length of the beard, and the layered robe.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the robe, the topknot, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, beard, and robe layers from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional, formal robe with wide sleeves, a dark belt, and simple flat shoes; the robe is primarily white and gray with dark pants underneath.
attribute_hairstyle: Long white hair tied in a topknot, smooth and neatly styled.
attribute_facial_features: Long, flowing white beard and mustache, pronounced eyebrows, serene expression, no glasses.
